scheme_name: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Insurance Premium for Shrimp Crop Insurance
page_title: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Insurance Premium for Shrimp Crop Insurance

details: The “Subsidy on Insurance Premium for Shrimp Crop Insurance” is a scheme component under the Intensive Fisheries Development Programme, implemented by the Fisheries Department, Government of Haryana. The scheme aims to promote sustainable aquaculture by reducing the financial risk of shrimp farmers through subsidized insurance coverage. Under this scheme, a 50% subsidy is provided on the insurance premium paid by eligible fish farmers for shrimp crop insurance, helping them mitigate potential crop losses.
benefits: 50% subsidy on the insurance premium paid for shrimp crop insurance.
eligibility: The applicant should be a permanent resident of Haryana.
The applicant should be a farmer and involved in shrimp farming.
The applicant should possess a valid Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP ID).
The applicant should be at least 18 years of age.

offline: For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’.
Verify the OTP received in the provided Email and Mobile Number. Alternatively, click on the Verification Link to activate the profile.
Login to Apply for the Scheme:
The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Fill in the required credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list” and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
Fill in all the details in the online application form and click on "Submit".
Type SARAL and send to 9954699899 to track your application.
Type SARAL<space><Application ID/Ticket No.> and send to 9954699899 to track your application/ticket.

documents_required: Agreement 1 - Agreement Deed between Fish Farmer and fisheries department
Date of Birth Certificate - Birth Certificate/Matriculation Certificate/PAN Card/Voter Card/Driving License
Identity Proof – Ration Card/Aadhar Card/PAN Card/Voter Card
Training Certificate – Fisheries Training from any Government Institute
Land Record - Land record from Tehsil(Own Land-Jamabandi, Nakal Akshizra, Farad) or registered lease deed

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the shrimp crop insurance subsidy?
faqs.answer: Residents of Haryana aged 18 or above, engaged in shrimp farming, and not employed in government services.

faqs.question: What is the amount of subsidy provided?
faqs.answer: 50% subsidy on the insurance premium for shrimp crop insurance.

faqs.question: Is this scheme available to all farmers?
faqs.answer: No, only to those involved in shrimp farming.

faqs.question: Who implements this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is implemented by the Fisheries Department, Government of Haryana.

faqs.question: Where do I apply?
faqs.answer: Applications can be submitted through the Fisheries Department or via the Antyodaya SARAL Portal of the Haryana Government.

faqs.question: What proof is needed for land ownership or lease?
faqs.answer: Land record (Jamabandi, Nakl-e-Xizra Fard) or a Registered Lease Deed is required.

faqs.question: Is it mandatory to have a Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP)?
faqs.answer: Yes, possessing a valid PPP ID is a mandatory eligibility criterion.

faqs.question: Can Government employees avail benefits under this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme excludes Government and Semi-Government employees from availing the subsidy.
